title: A Manager's Evening at the Plant
article_text: I am a manager at an international company. Our plant can contain many workers. I notice the nature of each section. I wonder about the structure of the region. I paint the wall myself. The official press can influence the growth of the plant. Whatever is necessary for the evening, we can do. We can miss a recent financial report. The manager can relate to every worker. Let's press the button exactly at the same time.

sentences.en: I am a manager at an international company.
sentences.zh: 我是一家国际公司的经理。

sentences.zh: 我们的工厂可以容纳很多工人。

Which word means 'to have something inside'?

image_prompts: A manager standing in front of a large international company building, looking professional.
A busy plant with many workers inside, machines and products around.
A person looking at different sections of a factory, noticing their features.
A person thinking about the structure of a region, with a map on the wall.
A person painting a wall with a brush, alone in a room.
A newspaper and a TV showing news about a plant's growth, with a manager watching.
A group of people preparing for an evening event, with a checklist of necessary items.
A person missing a financial report on a desk, looking worried.
A manager talking to a worker, both smiling and understanding each other.
Two hands pressing a button together at the same time, with a clock showing exact time.
